mappings.notes: Risk context and review evidence exist in repo documents and workflows, but security reviewer approval and immutable audit retention are not yet codified.
mappings.gapSummary: Add explicit security-review rules, policy-as-code, and evidence-retention boundaries.

mappings.standardControlTitle: Identify assets, dependencies, and risk context
mappings.notes: Issues, ADRs, runbooks, and generated reports provide a lightweight inventory of decisions and controls, but ownership and risk labels are not enforced through workflow policy.
mappings.gapSummary: Make risk labels, owners, and control requirements explicit before implementation proceeds.

mappings.notes: Automation identities are federated and repository-scoped, while human AWS/EKS access governance remains incomplete.
mappings.gapSummary: Codify Identity Center, operator RBAC, and periodic access review evidence.

mappings.notes: State read/write access is separated and generated admin values are sensitive outputs, but plaintext application secrets and absent rotation remain high-priority gaps.
mappings.gapSummary: Use Secrets Manager/KMS-backed delivery, remove plaintext Git secrets, and automate rotation/revocation.

mappings.standardControlTitle: Protect platforms, workloads, and supply chain
mappings.notes: Image build trust, immutable tags, and pinned actions are implemented, but vulnerability and admission gates are not yet enforcing release policy.
mappings.gapSummary: Fail or exception-gate high-risk CVEs and block privileged Kubernetes resources through policy.

mappings.standardControlTitle: Detect anomalous activity and control failures
mappings.notes: Logs, metrics, dashboards, smoke checks, and AIOps queries support investigation, but closed-loop alerting and authorized remediation are incomplete.
mappings.gapSummary: Add alert routing, incident-channel evidence, and remediation authorization records.

mappings.standardControlTitle: Respond to incidents with controlled actions
mappings.notes: Runbooks, AIOps investigation, workflow logs, and environment-gated apply workflows support response, but response ownership and channels are not formalized.
mappings.gapSummary: Define incident roles, escalation channel, remediation approval, and post-incident evidence capture.

mappings.standardControlTitle: Recover service delivery after changes or incidents
mappings.notes: Rollback runbooks and deployment gates exist around image releases, but recovery objectives and post-incident validation are not codified as a formal workflow.
mappings.gapSummary: Add recovery objectives, rollback validation steps, and evidence capture after restoration.
